code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Html}from'@react-three/drei';import'../styles/UserLabel.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const UserLabel=_ref=>{let{name,position,dept}=_ref;const[isTargeted,setIsTargeted]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const handleThreat=e=>{if(e.detail.user&&e.detail.user.toLowerCase()===name.toLowerCase()){setIsTargeted(true);setTimeout(()=>setIsTargeted(false),5000);}};const handleKillswitch=()=>{setIsTargeted(false);};window.addEventListener('SOC_THREAT_EVENT',handleThreat);window.addEventListener('SOC_KILLSWITCH',handleKillswitch);return()=>{window.removeEventListener('SOC_THREAT_EVENT',handleThreat);window.removeEventListener('SOC_KILLSWITCH',handleKillswitch);};},[name]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Html,{position:position,center:true,distanceFactor:10,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`user-hud-label${isTargeted?' targeted-alert':''}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"label-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"dept-tag",children:dept}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"user-name",children:name})]}),isTargeted&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"threat-ping",children:"\u26A0\uFE0F CRITICAL THREAT"})]})});};export default UserLabel;
